# jamfschool_update_device_esim (Action)

Queries a carrier URL to refresh eSIM cellular-plan profiles on a device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Refresh the eSIM cellular plan on a device.
action "jamfschool_update_device_esim" "refresh_esim" {
  config {
    serial_number           = "C02ABC123DEF"
    server_url              = "https://carrier.example.com"
    requires_network_tether = false
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_url` (String) The carrier's eSIM server URL to query.

### Optional

- `requires_network_tether` (Boolean) Whether network tethering is required for executing this command.
- `serial_number` (String) Device serial number. Provide this or `udid`.
- `udid` (String) Device UDID. Provide this or `serial_number`.
